He looks out the window with a worried expression as the neon lights of a city street reflect across the car's interior. (Storyline: This scene introduces another character who is also anxious, suggesting he is in a precarious or stressful situation, possibly being transported somewhere against his will.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, dramatic music continues, linking the two scenes.)
